title: Modeled Field
text: Modeled Field A Modeled Field is a Development Object that represents a unit of data in a Modeled Entity. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Modeled Entity Contains: Property , Code Container Generalization: Field Specializations Compilation Output: — URI format: ent: EntityName.ModelName :fld: FieldName Specialization Modeled Field specializes Development Object and Field in the following ways: It has a Modeled Entity as parent.
